name: Architectural Exploration Quality Rubric
instructions: Evaluate if the exploratory analysis successfully clarifies ambiguous product requirements and maps them accurately to existing codebase elements.

metrics.endpoint_mapping_precision: Rate 1-5. Score 5 if the model pinpoints specific, existing view and serializer classes from the topography map for the journal, coach, and insights tools. Score 1 if it only lists the abstract URLs provided in the prompt.
metrics.tradeof_depth: Rate 1-5. Did the model critically evaluate Enums vs. AWS Secrets vs. DB options, detailing performance, deployment complexity, and latency impact?
metrics.insights_resolution: Rate 1-5. Did the model inspect the topography map to explicitly determine the current structure of the insights endpoints and provide a concrete gating strategy for them?
